name: Directrent for Landlords
subtitle: List Properties, Collect Rent Direct
description:
List your Lagos properties directly to verified tenants — no agent fees, no delays, no middlemen. Join thousands of Lagos landlords managing their portfolios smarter.

📋 LIST YOUR PROPERTIES FREE
Your first listing is free. Reach thousands of verified, BVN/NIN-screened tenants.

💰 COLLECT RENT DIRECTLY
No 10% agent commission. Payments go straight to your verified bank account via Paystack.

✅ VERIFIED TENANTS ONLY
• BVN and NIN verification
• Employment and income screening
• Tenant ratings and rental history
• Secure escrow for deposits

📊 POWERFUL ANALYTICS
Track property views, inquiries, conversion rates, and compare against Lagos market averages.

📄 DIGITAL LEASE AGREEMENTS
Generate legally-compliant Lagos lease agreements digitally — signed, sealed, stored.

🔔 STAY IN CONTROL
Real-time notifications for new applications, messages, and payments.
